title: pituranthos rohlfsianus
intro: Pituranthos rohlfsianus, also known as the Arabian thistle, is a spiny, thistle-like plant that belongs to the Boraginaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used in medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Pituranthos rohlfsianus include its potential to reduce inflammation, treat wounds, and alleviate digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are typically used to make teas, infusions, and topical applications, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
intro_study: According to "Yakushigaku zasshi", pituranthos rohlfsianus, which is equivalent to Valerianae Radix, may be useful as a sedative drug for an aging society due to its gentle action.
